queries.question: What were the plays produced in London, and in what society were they set in?
queries.sql: SELECT title, society FROM Play JOIN Performance ON  Play.play_id = Performance.performance_id  JOIN Theatre On Theatre.theatre_id = Performance.theatre_id WHERE location = 'London';
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title ?society WHERE {
  ?play a :Play .
  ?performance a :Performance .
  ?play p:play_id ?play_id_l .
  ?performance p:performance_id ?performance_id_r .
  ?theatre a :Theatre .
  ?performance p:hasTheatre ?theatre .
  ?play p:title ?title .
  ?play p:society ?society .
  ?theatre p:location ?location_f .
  FILTER(STR(?play_id_l) = STR(?performance_id_r))
  FILTER(STR(?location_f) = "London")
}

queries.question: show me the title, epoch and genre of Shakespeare's play
queries.sql: SELECT title, epoch, genre FROM Play WHERE author LIKE '%Shakespeare%';
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title ?epoch ?genre WHERE {
  ?play a :Play .
  ?play p:title ?title .
  ?play p:epoch ?epoch .
  ?play p:genre ?genre .
  ?play p:author ?author_lk .
  FILTER(REGEX(STR(?author_lk), "^.*Shakespeare.*$", "i"))
}

PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>

  ?play a :Play .

  ?performance p:performance_id ?performance_id_r .
  ?theatre a :Theatre .
  ?performance p:hasTheatre ?theatre .

  ?theatre p:location ?location_f .

  FILTER(STR(?location_f) = "London")
}
